creator: judahrichardson@gmail.com
text: Same problem here. Dell OptiPlex 390 SFF (Intel Core 2nd Gen.) Thanks to this I pretty much can't run 12.1 (I need a DE.) Since I don't run outdated OS releases, I'm gonna have to abandon FreeBSD. Basic functionality like this not working is a major shortcoming of the project, and before someone chimes in with the "manpower" excuse, OpenIndiana runs quite well on the same hardware.
